creator: nxjoseph@protonmail.com
text:
I want to buy a USB bluetooth adapter to use with my earbuds on my PC and i'd like to know what is the current state of TP-Link UB500 v1 adapter on FreeBSD.

TP-Link UB500 v1 seems to use rtl8761b chipset and this chipset firmware can be installed from port comms/rtlbt-firmware. Did you already installed this port and tested it? If not so, can you try installing that port and try again, please. Thanks in advance.
